title: Search box typing lag under product-card load
summary: Typing feels sticky after the third character because urgent render work and search requests both fire on every keystroke.
signals: Large CPU cost in render and highlight logic
Every keystroke also triggers network work

title: Latest query loses to stale search results
summary: A shared results bucket mixes cache hydrate and network commits, so an older slow query can still repaint the list after the user has moved on.
signals: Cards briefly flash back to an older query
Cache hydrate and network response both write into one results store
Debounce reduced traffic but stale UI still appears on slow network

title: Modal opens visually but fails screen-reader users
summary: A custom modal looks fine, but focus escapes behind it and screen readers announce an unnamed generic region.
signals: Screen reader does not announce modal name
Closing the modal loses the original trigger focus

title: Realtime feed leaks sockets and listeners
summary: Route mounts and filter changes both create overlapping feed subscriptions, while stale handlers and unclear socket ownership leave old work alive.
signals: Duplicate events grow after route changes and filter tweaks
Some duplicate logs still mention old filter values
Connection and listener counts keep climbing in dev tools

title: Context update causes rerender storm
summary: One provider holds too much frequently changing state, so unrelated consumers rerender on every tiny update.
signals: Provider value identity changes every update

title: Autosave overwrites the latest draft
summary: Rapid edits plus flaky network produce out-of-order autosave acknowledgements that replace newer text with stale content.
signals: Textarea jumps back to older content
